title: February 10
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 10''' is the 41st day of the year. There are 324 days remaining, 325 in leap years.</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Laura Dern]] is born.
*[[1988]] – [[Daniel Kwan]] is born.
*[[1999]] – Recording begins for the [[Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace (soundtrack)|''Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace'' soundtrack]].
*1999 – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 4|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 4]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Steve Gerber]] dies.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Paragon]]'' released.
*2010 – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 8: Tatooine]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.17]]'' published.
*2011 – [[Ravi Cabot-Conyers]] is born.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' published.
*2012 – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] is released in 3D.
*2012 – "[[Crisis on Naboo]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2012 – [[David Anthony Pizzuto]] dies.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Episode IV: A New Hope Read-Along Storybook and CD]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 16|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 16]] published.
*2016 – "[[The Call]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – "[[The New Trooper]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2021]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 10|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 10]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 200|''Star Wars Insider'' 200]] published.
<noinclude>
